description: You are a registered dietitian at a community health clinic. Create a comprehensive nutrition analysis workbook for a 55-year-old male patient with Type 2 diabetes (BMI 31, sedentary) using his 7-day food diary (~/Documents/Spreadsheets/food_diary.csv), USDA nutritional data (~/Documents/Spreadsheets/usda_nutrients.csv), and ADA dietary targets (~/Documents/ADA_guidelines.txt). Save the workbook to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/nutrition_analysis.xlsx. The workbook must include per-item intake calculations, daily totals for calories and key nutrients (protein, carbs, fat, fiber, sodium), meal-level carbohydrate analysis flagging entries exceeding 60g, and comparisons against ADA targets. Provide a weekly summary showing average, minimum, and maximum daily intakes, along with a section identifying nutritional problem areas such as high-sodium days or low-fiber intake. Organize the workbook into at least three sheets using professional clinical nutrition terminology and clear headers.
